method: axe-core CDN injection + manual viewport/overflow checks

moderate.help: Document should have one main landmark
Page should contain a level-one heading
All page content should be contained by landmarks

<div class="flex flex-col space-y-1.5 p-6 sm:p-8 border-b border-white/5 text-center">

moderate.help: The skip-link target should exist and be focusable
